headline: Zacks Industry Outlook Highlights Estee Lauder, e.l.f. Beauty, Helen of Troy and Nu Skin
summary: EL, ELF, HELE and NUS are leveraging innovation, digital tools and strong beauty demand as the cosmetics industry navigates cost pressures.
